description: Stable expected GitHub required-check contexts for Auto-G16. Local static audit proves only workflow declaration compatibility; remote branch protection and run success require separate read-only verification.

source_evidence.basis: Read-only observation of the latest successful main run on the observation date. This evidence is historical and is not automatically refreshed.

remote_branch_protection_snapshot.note: Date-bound read-only snapshot observed on 2026-07-21. It records the five expected contexts as aligned at that time; static audit does not prove current remote settings or CI success.

limitations: A local static audit cannot prove current GitHub branch protection or permissions.
A workflow declaration cannot prove that a check ran or succeeded.
The remote snapshot is dated historical evidence, not current truth.
